pages.text: Now that a seed only ever spends $(italic)down$() into a sapling, the seeds you don't plant are worth keeping. Many of them $(bold)press into fluids$().$(br2)This uses Create's $(bold)compacting$() recipe: a $(item)Basin$() with a $(item)Mechanical Press$() running directly above it. Drop a single seed in the basin and the press squeezes it into liquid — no heat, no spout, no byproduct.
pages.title: Pressing Seeds

pages.text: $(bold)The point.$() The big $(italic)Mega$() seeds (jungle, spruce, crimson, warped) have $(bold)no$() sapling recipe at all — pressing is the only thing they are good for. Ordinary seeds give you a steady, automatable trickle of useful fluids straight off a tree farm.$(br2)One seed, one press cycle, one slug of fluid. Pipe the basin's output into a tank and walk away.
pages.title: Why Press?

pages.text: $(bold)Experience$() $(italic)(Create: Enchantment Industry)$():$(br)$(li)Quark blossom seeds — Fiery, Frosty, Serene, Sunny, Warm — $(bold)100 mb$() each.$(li)Ancient (Ashen) seed — $(bold)500 mb$(), the richest XP source of the set.$(br)Pair a blossom-tree farm with this for a hands-off liquid-XP supply.
pages.title: Liquid Experience

pages.text: $(bold)Plant Oil$() $(italic)(Diesel Generators)$():$(br)$(li)Mega Jungle seed — $(bold)500 mb$()$(li)Mega Spruce seed — $(bold)500 mb$()$(br2)$(bold)Lumisene$() $(italic)(Supplementaries)$():$(br)$(li)Glow Shroom seed — $(bold)100 mb$()
pages.title: Oil & Glow

pages.text: $(bold)Tinkers' slime fluids$() $(italic)(250 mb each)$():$(br)$(li)Greenheart → Earth Slime$(li)Skyroot → Sky Slime$(li)Enderbark → Ender Slime$(li)Bloodshroom → Ichor$(br2)A slime-tree farm becomes a quiet slime-fluid pump — no slime islands required.
pages.title: Slime Fluids

pages.text: $(bold)Hot Tinkers' fluids$() — the nether seeds:$(br)$(li)Crimson seed → $(bold)Blazing Blood$(), 100 mb (Mega Crimson → 500 mb)$(li)Warped seed → $(bold)Liquid Soul$(), 100 mb (Mega Warped → 500 mb)$(br2)The Mega forms give five times the fluid, so a single fungus that grows to full Mega size is well worth the press.
pages.title: Nether Fluids
